titleStmt.title: SII 19.304: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 304. (A.R. No. 583 of 1920.) UDAIYĀRKUḌI NEAR KĀṬṬURMANNARKŌYIL, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, ANANTĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: The inscription is incomplete and also damaged. It records the gift of an areca garden and two other pieces of land to provide for the daily supply of areca-nuts and betel leaves, and also camphor during the three services in the temple of Tiruvanantīśvarattu-Paramēśvara at Vīranārāyaṇa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, by a resident of the village by name Mātirudāsa-Kramavittaṉ son of Tiruvanantīsvara-Kramavittan of Pullalūr. This might be assignable to Uttama-Chōḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī .
kopparakeśari
panmarkku yāṇṭu
10 2Āvatu vaṭaka
rai brahmadeyam
śrī viranārāyaṇacca
turvvetimaṅkalattu
śrī cariceri pu
ḷḷaḷur tiruvaṉan=tīśvara
kkiramavittan ma� māti
rutāsakkiramavittaneṉ I
vvūr tiruvaṉan=tīśvamuṭai
ya paramiśvararkku tirikālam
muṉṟu santikku potuyvatāka nicatam ṉūṟṟa
ṟupatu kāyamutukku potorupaṟṟāka nicatam teriyilai paṟṟu muṉṟukkum Āṭṭaiviṭṭa Ira
ṇṭu kāciṉ kaṟpūra vai Aṇaittukkumāka kuṭutta nilamāvatu Ivvūr vaṭapiṭākai viranā
rāyaṇavatikku teṟkku nālāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu mutal catirattu melai Aṟu
māvil viranārāyaṇacceri savarṇaiccaturvvetibhaṭṭāra Aṭṭakattārkku muṉti kaipa
ṭṭa teṟkkaṭainta Oru māmukkāṇiyil teṟka rai māvarai
vaṭakkil Araimā Araikkāṇi Arai muntirikaiyil kiḻakkaṭaiya kāṇi muntirikai kāl
vattaṉaiyāl Uṭaiya nilam Ikkamukam
toṭṭamum Ippiṭākaiyil rāmatevavatikku meṟkku cantraśekaravāykkālukku vaṭakku mutal kaṇṇāṟ
ṟu mutal catirattu māṉakula kāla(cala)ceri kuṇṭur tirunārāyaṇabhaṭṭa comāciyāruḷḷiṭṭa Aṣṭakattomukkuppaṭṭa
muṉṟu māvil melkkaṭaiya nāṉ ṉappaṉārpakkalk kūṟupeṟṟuṭaiya mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi yarai muntirikai nilam
Ivvatikke meṟkku Ivvāykkālukke vaṭakku śrīviraśrīkāmukacceri surasārampi mutta bhaṭṭaruḷḷiṭṭa A
ṣṭakattārkku paṭṭa muṉṟumāvil nāṉ Emappaṉārpakkal kūṟupeṟṟuṭaiya kāṇi Araikkāṇiy Āka nilam mākkāṇiya
rai muntirikai nilamum kamukamtoṭṭam nilam kāṇi muntirikaik kāl muntirikaiyum tiruvaṉa n=tiśvaramuṭaiya paraThe continuation is not traceable.
Digital edition of SII 19.304 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
